Overview

Home Screen

Search Dialog

On this page

Milki Launcher Overview ​

Milki is a free and open-source, privacy-respecting Android launcher focused on search-driven usage. Milki places a powerful search dialog at the center of your experience. Milki is designed to work perfectly out-of-the-box, but gives you the freedom to tweak almost every aspect of the UI and behavior.

  • Privacy First: We don't track your app usage, collect telemetry, or show ads. Your data stays on your device.
  • Search-Driven: Find exactly what you need—apps, contacts, web results, or settings—instantly.
  • Free & Open: Free as in freedom and free of charge—nothing is ever gated behind a paywall.
  • Open Ecosystem: 100% open source, welcoming community contributions.

Installation ​

You can download Milki directly from our GitHub Releases page. It is also available via F-Droid (coming soon).

sh
# Example F-Droid repo installation (coming soon)
https://fdroid.milkilabs.com/repo
